testcase.name: test_scrubDigits_prices

failure.message: expected:<... sold X products by [120$ or $120]> but was:<... sold X products by [XXX$ or $XXX]>

testcase.failure: org.junit.ComparisonFailure: expected:<... sold X products by [120$ or $120]> but was:<... sold X products by [XXX$ or $XXX]> at org.junit.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:117) at
